### Highlights | 更新内容

- 重新整理了输入设置页，把鼠标、键盘、手柄拆成更清晰的一级区域；鼠标页现在默认更偏向远控场景，自由鼠标是默认鼠标模式，常用鼠标与滚轮参数也直接暴露在一级设置里。
  Reworked the input settings page into clearer top-level Mouse, Keyboard, and Controller areas. The mouse page now defaults toward remote-control use, with Free Mouse as the default mode and the most useful mouse and wheel controls exposed in the main section.
- 鼠标输入路径加入了新的自动策略：支持的系统会优先尝试 CoreHID，并按 CoreHID → HID → MFI 自动回退；这样既保留了低延迟路径，也降低了兼容性切换的门槛。
  The mouse input stack now uses a new automatic strategy: supported systems try CoreHID first and then fall back through HID → MFI. This keeps the lower-latency path available without making compatibility tuning a manual requirement.
- 滚轮逻辑重构为按来源分别处理物理滚轮、改写滚轮和触控板，重点改进了滚动延迟、方向稳定性和单次滚动距离的可控性，让默认体验更接近“原生、低延迟、可预期”。
  Wheel handling was rebuilt around separate paths for physical wheels, rewritten wheels, and trackpads, with a focus on lower latency, stable direction handling, and more controllable per-scroll distance so the default feel stays closer to native, low-latency, and predictable behavior.
- README 与设置相关文案已同步刷新，补齐了最近多轮提交里新增的输入、诊断、连接与调优能力，避免文档继续落后于当前版本。
  The README and settings copy have been refreshed to reflect the input, diagnostics, connectivity, and tuning work added across the recent rounds of changes, so the documentation no longer trails the current app behavior.

### Maintenance | 维护更新

- 同步修正了 Guide 模拟与手柄模拟鼠标的描述，去掉了容易误导用户的“长按 Start”文案，减少与手柄鼠标功能的理解冲突。
  Updated the Guide emulation and controller-mouse wording to remove the misleading “hold Start” phrasing, reducing confusion with the controller mouse feature.
- 为后续 `v1.3.2` 发版准备了双语 release notes 模板内容，方便继续沿用现有的成对发布说明工作流。
  Added the paired bilingual release-note content needed to prepare the `v1.3.2` release while keeping the existing side-by-side release-note workflow intact.
